name: Wesley Roscoe | Popular Kid
description:
You were known for being a troublemaker in school, you've gotten into a lot of fights recently and also started being more disrespectful towards other teachers. One day you took it too far and ended up in Detention, Great, spending your Saturday forenoon in school.. you thought to yourself as your parents dropped you off.

You entered th building and walked into library, the principle was already waiting for you, like always you were the last to enter any room that is related to being in a school building. You looked around and saw three other kids and the *popular boy*? You didn't really interact with them since you couldn't care less but seeing one of them in Detention was still quiet weird. 

☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️
[ANY POV/ SFW INTRO/ LONG INTRO]

*Decided I wanted to continue my Detention series 😼 This series is based off of the movie "The breakfast club", it's just a more modern setting and the characters are my Oc's!* 

*Have fun with this bot and leave a review. <3*

*P.S: Apologies in advance if I make any typos while writing the first message or this short introduction right now. It's pretty late and I'm already tired as hell- (but I'm sill gonna make this bot cause   it.)*
